positive: A minimalist and whimsical arrangement of stylized celestial bodies, including moons, stars, nebulas, and crescent planets, forming an abstract cosmic forest. The scene should feature clean, bold silhouettes against a deep midnight indigo and rich royal purple background. Geometric constellations connect the planets like subtle glowing thread. Focus on strong linework, high contrast, and negative space to give an ethereal, elegant feel. Ideal for screen printing on apparel, with a central, balanced composition. Style: Neo-Art Deco, Mid-Century Modern illustration, highly graphic, vibrant yet subdued color palette.
